steps.title: Use what initial deposit means
steps.content: The initial deposit is the account balance at the moment the account was opened. On this graph, time since the initial deposit is $x$, so the initial deposit happens at $x=0$ months.

steps.title: Read the y-intercept
steps.content: At $x=0$, the line crosses the $y$-axis at $15$. The $y$-axis is labeled in dollars, so this means the estimated starting balance was $15.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The question asks for the amount of the initial deposit to the nearest whole dollar. The graph gives $f(0)=15$, so the answer is 15.
